positive: Minimalist line art of a howling wolf surrounded by stylized constellations and moons, forming a complex mandala pattern. The style should be high-contrast black ink on white background, resembling elegant tattoo flash or Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock printing techniques. Use negative space dramatically, focusing on clean, sharp silhouettes and balanced composition. The composition must be perfectly centered, suitable for a circular chest print. Use geometric floral elements and celestial glyphs to fill the background space harmoniously. Overhead soft studio lighting, ultra detailed, vector illustration, engraving style.
